opinion.h: MURPHY V. TURMAN OIL CO , 300 U.S. 685 (1937)
C. H. MURPHY et al., petitioners, v. TURMAN OIL COMPANY et al. No. 747.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. J. N. Saye, of Longview, Tex., for petitioners.

On petition for writ of certiorari to the Court of Civil Appeals, 3d Supreme Judicial District, State of Texas. Dismissed on motion of counsel for the petitioners.[ Murphy v. Turman Oil Co 300 U.S. 685 (1937) ]
